summary: A heartfelt audience‑energy vibe captured on a soundboard source with solid overall sound.
review: The reviewer expresses deep affection for the Dead and appreciates the energy of an audience recording even though this is likely a soundboard (sbd) source. While no specific performance details are given, the positive tone and 4‑star rating indicate they enjoyed both the music and the audio quality overall.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, enthusiastic but lacking concrete details on performance or sound; rating reflects general positivity with uncertainty about specific qualities.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer mentions overall satisfaction with sound quality but provides no specific technical comments.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer states set lists don’t matter to them, so no assessment of flow is offered.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentioned in a personal anecdote about singing "Friend of the Devil" with Jerry; no performance critique.
